issues.description: Card has significant text but effects array is empty. Should contain: (1) Condition checking Leader has <Slash> attribute AND 6+ rested DON cards, (2) Action preventing opponent from resting this Character, (3) Duration during opponent's turn. [Blocker] keyword should be represented as GiveKeyword action.

suggestedDsl.effectText: If your Leader has the <Slash> attribute and you have 6 or more rested DON!! cards, this Character cannot be rested by your opponent's effects.
